title: Adding Developer Solution to 216 Well Cartridge Plate
author: Opentrons
materials: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: Nest 1-Well Reservoir 195 mL **Using...
steps.instruction: Nest 1-Well Reservoir 195 mL **Using the customizations field (below), set up your protocol.** * **Number of Samples**: Specify the number of samples in your protocol run. * **Dispense Height Above Cartridge**: Specify the height (mm) above the cartridge the pipette will dispense liquid * **Dispense Volume**: Specify the volume (µL) of developer solution dispensed into each cartridge * **Dispense Flow Rate**: Specify the rate (µL/sec) at which the pipette will aspirate solution into each cartridge * **Dispense Flow Rate**: Spe

steps.title: Download your protocol package containing the...
steps.instruction: Download your protocol package containing the custom labware definitions for the reservoir and plate.

steps.title: Upload the labware definition in the OT App
steps.instruction: Upload the labware definition in the OT App. For help, please see this article.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
